name: Buffalo Fillet with Honey Roasted Vidalias
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound spinach, sauteed with garlic, salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl combine all salsa ingredients. Stir to combine and allow to sit for 30 minutes.
2. In a blender puree all sauce ingredients until smooth. Adjust seasoning and reserve.
3. Season fillets with salt and pepper. Rub onion halves with honey, oil, salt, and pepper. Place in a pan and cover. Cook at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes or until tender. Remove the center of each onion half and chop.
4. Blanch sugar snaps and carrots.
5. Roast the fillets at 550 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
6. In one quarter of the plate, garnish with spinach. In the other two quarters, garnish with yellow pepper salsa. Place a fillet in one quarter of the salsa and onion mixture, and the remaining quarter garnished with red pepper sauce on another fillet.
